channel.title: Create Ubuntu VMs :: Field SE Lab Guide
channel.description: RDP to OOB. ​ from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/ubuntu ./create_ubuntu_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_sdwan ./start_stop_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_sdwan started Make sure Ubuntu-x VMs have fully started (i.e. GUI is up and running) before exeucting the following. Suggest opening console windows on PVE to verify. ​ from Terminal in OOB ./wallpaper_update.sh ubuntu_sdwan
